name: Leatherback Sea Turtle
conservationEfforts: Turtle Excluder Devices (TEDs) required in shrimp trawls. Nesting beach protection programs worldwide. Plastic pollution reduction campaigns.
description: The largest living turtle, reaching 2 meters and 700 kg. It can dive to 1,200 meters and maintain body temperature in near-freezing water. Their population has declined 40% in 15 years.
